titles.en: Four of the Characteristics of the Prophets
Four of the Characteristics of the Prophets

segments: : حدثنا سعد بن عبد الله، عن أحمد بن محمد ابن عيسى، عن الحسن بن محبوب، عن أبان، عن الحلبي، عن أبي عبد الله عليه السلام قال: إن الصبر والبر والحلم وحسن الخلق من أخلاق الانبياء
arabic.text: : حدثنا سعد بن عبد الله، عن أحمد بن محمد ابن عيسى، عن الحسن بن محبوب، عن أبان، عن الحلبي، عن أبي عبد الله عليه السلام قال: إن الصبر والبر والحلم وحسن الخلق من أخلاق الانبياء

segments: 4-121 (The compiler of the book narrated) that his father - may God be pleased with him - narrated that Sa’ed ibn Abdullah quoted Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Isa, on the authority of Al-Hassan ibn Mahboob, on the authority of Aban, on the authority of Al-Halabi that Aba Abdullah as-Sadiq (MGB) said, “Indeed perseverance, kindness, patience and being good-tempered are of the characteristics of the Prophets.”
en.dr-ali-peiravi.text: 4-121 (The compiler of the book narrated) that his father - may God be pleased with him - narrated that Sa’ed ibn Abdullah quoted Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Isa, on the authority of Al-Hassan ibn Mahboob, on the authority of Aban, on the authority of Al-Halabi that Aba Abdullah as-Sadiq (MGB) said, “Indeed perseverance, kindness, patience and being good-tempered are of the characteristics of the Prophets.”

narratorChain.raw: 4-12 1 حدثنا أبي رضي الله عنه قال
